     The Numbers Business Report

Crawl (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $39,014,193Details
International Box Office $52,706,297
Worldwide Box Office $91,720,490
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $4,336,921
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,330,641
Total $6,667,562
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When a massive hurricane hits her Florida hometown, Haley ignores evacuation orders to search for her missing father. Finding him gravely injured in the crawl space of their family home, the two become trapped by quickly encroaching floodwaters. As time runs out to escape the strengthening storm, Haley and her father discover that the rising water level is the least of their fears.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$12,005,210 (30.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.25 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:42.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$17,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,170 opening theaters/3,170 max. theaters, 3.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $50,939,924

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 12th, 2019 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: July 11th, 2019 (Wide) (New Zealand)
July 12th, 2019 (Wide) (Netherlands)
July 12th, 2019 (Wide) (Australia)
July 12th, 2019 (Wide) (Taiwan)
July 12th, 2019 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)
Video Release: September 24th, 2019 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: R for bloody creature violence, and brief language.
(Rating bulletin 2579 (Cert #51915), 5/22/2019)
Running Time: 87 minutes
Geographical setting: Florida
Plot point: Animals Gone Bad, Dysfunctional Family, Rescue, Trapped, Extreme Weather
Subgenre: Nature Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Paramount Pictures, Raimi Productions, Fire Axe Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

When a massive hurricane hits her Florida hometown, Haley ignores evacuation orders to search for her missing father. As time runs out to escape the strengthening storm, Haley and her father discover that the rising water level is the least of their fears.
